title: Uttarakhand Teacher Eligibility Test UTET 2026 + Government Job + Uttarakhand + 2026 + Apply Now
excerpt: Uttarakhand Teacher Eligibility Test UTET 2026 online application process has started. Candidates can apply online from 14 July 2026 to 03 August 2026. The exam will be held on 29 September 2026.
value_prop: _Apply for Uttarakhand Teacher Eligibility Test UTET 2026 and start your teaching career in Uttarakhand_
secondary_subtitle: _Get all the details about UTET 2026, including eligibility, application process, and exam dates_

About Organization

Uttarakhand Board of School Education (UBSE) is the organization responsible for conducting the Uttarakhand Teacher Eligibility Test UTET 2026.

As per official notification, the organization is responsible for the education system in Uttarakhand.

About the Programme

The Uttarakhand Teacher Eligibility Test UTET 2026 is a government job opportunity for candidates who want to start their teaching career in Uttarakhand.

The programme aims to provide eligible candidates with a teaching position in government schools in Uttarakhand.
